faqs.question: How often do I need mosquito control service in Ozone Park?
faqs.answer: For optimal protection in Ozone Park, we recommend treatments every 3-4 weeks during mosquito season (May through September). Queens' humid summers and frequent rain create continuous breeding conditions, so regular treatments ensure your yard stays protected throughout the warm months when mosquitoes are most active.

faqs.question: What's included in the $125 – $325 mosquito control service?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size and treatment frequency. Our service includes a thorough inspection of breeding sites, targeted barrier spray treatment of vegetation and standing water areas, larvicide application where needed, and follow-up monitoring. We treat yards, patios, and outdoor living spaces to create a protective barrier around your Ozone Park home.
